recommendations.title: Phase IV
recommendations.overview: Arizona ants mock the food chain on their way to a desert lab to get two scientists and a woman.

recommendations.title: Minuscule: Valley of the Lost Ants
recommendations.overview: In a peaceful little clearing, the remains of a hastily abandoned picnic sparks a battle between two tribes of ants. A bold young ladybug finds himself caught in the middle. He befriends the leader of the black ants, Mandible, and helps him save the

recommendations.title: The Pact II
recommendations.overview: The sequel is set just weeks after Annie Barlow's deadly confrontation with the Judas Killer. In this elevated sequel, we meet June, a woman whose carefully constructed life is beginning to unravel due to lucid nightmares so awful they disturb her wa

recommendations.title: The Grasshopper and the Ants
recommendations.overview: As in the classic fable, the grasshopper plays his fiddle and lives for the moment, while the industrious ants squirrel away massive amounts of food for the winter. With his song, he's able to convince at least one small ant until the queen arrives a

recommendations.title: The 2 Usual Idiots
recommendations.overview: The sequel to 2011 film "I soliti idioti".

recommendations.title: Lommbock
recommendations.overview: Sequel to Lammbock. Stefan and Kai meet again after years. Stefan became a successful lawyer in Dubai while Kai is stuck in their home town. Kai has relationship issues and is trying hard to get in touch with his step son who is getting in serious tr

recommendations.title: Little White Lies 2
recommendations.overview: The sequel to Little White Lies ("Les petits mouchoirs"), set 7 years later. The group of friends, which had separated, reunites for the surprise birthday party organized for Max.

recommendations.title: Babylon 5: A Call to Arms
recommendations.overview: Allies of the Shadows seek revenge against humanity. This movie sets up the series, "Crusade," the sequel to "Babylon 5."

recommendations.title: It's a Wonderful Binge
recommendations.overview: Like the original film, the sequel is set in a near future where all drinking and drugs are banned except for on one glorious day known as The Binge. This year, that day happens to miraculously land on Christmas.

recommendations.title: My Dinner with Andre
recommendations.overview: Two old friends meet for dinner; as one tells anecdotes detailing his experiences, the other notices their differing worldviews.
